description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul shape. The body is finished in a dark, possibly black color with visible areas of wear and chipping, especially on the back, suggesting heavy use or a relic finish. The front features two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch, all in a traditional Les Paul layout. The neck is set-in and features a rosewood or ebony fingerboard with dot inlays, leading up to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side. The hardware, including the bridge and pickup covers, appears metallic and slightly aged. The overall look is robust and iconic, suitable for urban music scenes or street performances.
description: A worn, single-cutaway electric guitar with a dark finish, dual humbuckers, and classic Les Paul styling. Visible wear and metallic hardware give it a rugged, urban character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark body, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, toggle switch, and the full fingerboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thickness, arched top, and the set-in neck joint.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying significant wear on the back, the single cutaway, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the guitar's depth and the contour of the body and neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Les Paul shape, no visible logo
